# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Response;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Throwable;

class WebsitePreviewController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Fetches and displays a website preview.
     *
     * @param Request $request
     * @return Response
     */
    public function showPreview(Request $request): Response
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'url' => 'required|url',
        ]);

        $url = $validated['url'];

        $ch = curl_init();

        try {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, true);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS, 5);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 10);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT, 5);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_USERAGENT, 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36');
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false);
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST, false);

            $content = curl_exec($ch);
            $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

            if (curl_errno($ch)) {
                $errorMsg = curl_error($ch);
                Log::error("cURL error fetching URL '{$url}': {$errorMsg}");
                return new Response("Error fetching preview: {$errorMsg}", 500);
            }

            if ($httpCode >= 400) {
                Log::warning("Received HTTP {$httpCode} for URL '{$url}'");
                return new Response("Could not fetch preview. Remote server returned HTTP {$httpCode}.", $httpCode);
            }

            return new Response($content, 200, ['Content-Type' => 'text/html']);

        } catch (Throwable $e) {
            Log::error("Exception in WebsitePreviewController: " . $e->getMessage(), ['exception' => $e]);
            return new Response("An unexpected error occurred: " . $e->getMessage(), 500);
        } finally {
            if (is_resource($ch)) {
                curl_close($ch);
            }
        }
    }
}
